input.brief: Opening-weekend push aimed at parents planning the family weekend

variants.hook: Bring the kid who still checks under the bed.
variants.primary_text: Luma is scared of the dark too. This summer she becomes the light her whole swarm needs.
variants.verdict: Winner. A named fear, a named character, an invitation written to one parent. Nothing to cut.

variants.hook: The dark is big. She is small. Come anyway.
variants.primary_text: A firefly who's afraid of the dark has one night to guide everyone home. For every family with a hallway light left on.
variants.verdict: Strong. The three-beat hook flirts with a power-list rhythm; the second sentence earns it back.

variants.hook: This summer's brightest family night out.
variants.primary_text: Luma lights up the big screen with laughter and heart for all ages. A magical adventure the whole family will love.
variants.verdict: Any animated film could run this. 'Magical adventure the whole family will love' fails the prove-it test twice.

variants.hook: Critics are calling Luma an instant classic!
variants.primary_text: Don't miss the unforgettable event of the summer. Guaranteed fun for everyone!
variants.verdict: Invented critic consensus, banned words, em dash, desperation CTA. This is the control sample.
